_meta.doc: DO NOT edit by hand. Re-run build_priors.py to regenerate.

historian: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial bias. Layers with large input channels (C ≥ 128) benefit from C-spatial at L1[O] = pe_dim. Push the Planner toward pe_dim=64-128 with C_spatial_L1=pe_dim and small-to-medium K_spatial_L2.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — large-K bias. This layer has many output channels (K ≥ 256). The dominant axis is K-spatial at L2. ALWAYS advocate pe_dim=128 with K_spatial_L2=128 (or =pe_dim) to maximize PE utilization. If recent submits use pe_dim ≤ 32, push the Planner to scale up.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial direction. Direct Executor to pe_dim ∈ {64, 128}, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim, K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32}. Optionally add PQ_at_L1 for output-stationary at the accumulator.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim ∈ {64, 128} with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1 (1-8). Keep R/S at L3 temporal. This is the canonical weight-stationary-at-L2 layout for large-K convs.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial executor. Default pe_dim=64-128. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32, 64} with fixed C_spatial_L1=128. Submit 4 candidates per turn.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — large-K bias. This layer has many output channels (K ≥ 256). The dominant axis is K-spatial at L2. ALWAYS advocate pe_dim=128 with K_spatial_L2=128 (or =pe_dim) to maximize PE utilization. If recent submits use pe_dim ≤ 32, push the Planner to scale up.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial direction. Direct Executor to pe_dim ∈ {64, 128}, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim, K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32}. Optionally add PQ_at_L1 for output-stationary at the accumulator.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial executor. Default pe_dim=64-128. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32, 64} with fixed C_spatial_L1=128. Submit 4 candidates per turn.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian:
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — output-stationary at L1[O]. This layer's spatial dimensions (P, Q) are small enough to fit a full tile in the L1 accumulator. Push the Planner toward `L1[O] P

Q CX` — the canonical output-stationary placement. Validated empirically to give 10-100× EDP improvement over K-tiling on stride=2 / small-PQ layers.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — large-K bias. This layer has many output channels (K ≥ 256). The dominant axis is K-spatial at L2. ALWAYS advocate pe_dim=128 with K_spatial_L2=128 (or =pe_dim) to maximize PE utilization. If recent submits use pe_dim ≤ 32, push the Planner to scale up.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — full-PQ-at-L1 direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim=128 with PQ_at_L1 = [P, Q] (entire tile at accumulator), K_spatial_L2 = 1, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim. Both this and the K-spatial alternative should be tested in the same session.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim ∈ {64, 128} with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1 (1-8). Keep R/S at L3 temporal. This is the canonical weight-stationary-at-L2 layout for large-K convs.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L1[O] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L1=[P, Q] (or use Schema B raw mapping `L1[O] P<n> Q<m> C<k>X`). Default pe_dim=128. Batch 3-4 candidates varying C_spatial_L1 ∈ {64, 128} and K_temporal_L3.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian:
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — output-stationary at L1[O]. This layer's spatial dimensions (P, Q) are small enough to fit a full tile in the L1 accumulator. Push the Planner toward `L1[O] P

Q CX` — the canonical output-stationary placement. Validated empirically to give 10-100× EDP improvement over K-tiling on stride=2 / small-PQ layers.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — weight-stationary at L0[W] (PQ at registers). Small-PQ layers benefit from placing the (P, Q) tile at L0[W] so weights stream once and stay register-stationary while outputs accumulate. This placement is ORTHOGONAL to pe_dim choice — try the L0 placement at pe_dim ∈ {32, 64, 128}, picking pe_dim to match the layer's K and C (large K → pe=128, tiny K → pe=32). Empirically wins on layers where P×Q ≤ ~128 and stride=2.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — full-PQ-at-L1 direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim=128 with PQ_at_L1 = [P, Q] (entire tile at accumulator), K_spatial_L2 = 1, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim. Both this and the K-spatial alternative should be tested in the same session.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — register-stationary direction. Direct Executor to PQ_at_L0=[P, Q] with pe_dim spanning {32, 64, 128} so the auction can compare them. Pair with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1. Compare directly against the L1[O] regime.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L1[O] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L1=[P, Q] (or use Schema B raw mapping `L1[O] P<n> Q<m> C<k>X`). Default pe_dim=128. Batch 3-4 candidates varying C_spatial_L1 ∈ {64, 128} and K_temporal_L3.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L0[W] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L0=[P, Q]. Submit 3-4 candidates per turn varying pe_dim ∈ {32, 64, 128} and K_spatial_L2 to find the right balance for this layer's K/C ratio. Validate locally.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — small-pe regime. This layer has tiny C or tiny K; large pe_dim wastes PEs. Push the Planner toward pe_dim=16 with full sweep over K and C tiling.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial bias. Layers with large input channels (C ≥ 128) benefit from C-spatial at L1[O] = pe_dim. Push the Planner toward pe_dim=64-128 with C_spatial_L1=pe_dim and small-to-medium K_spatial_L2.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — small-pe direction. pe_dim=16. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 4, 8, 16} and C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 3} (since C is tiny). Vary PQ_at_L0/L1 across submits.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial direction. Direct Executor to pe_dim ∈ {64, 128}, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim, K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32}. Optionally add PQ_at_L1 for output-stationary at the accumulator.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — small-pe executor. pe_dim=16. Submit 4-5 candidates per turn over K_spatial × PQ placements.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial executor. Default pe_dim=64-128. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32, 64} with fixed C_spatial_L1=128. Submit 4 candidates per turn.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial direction. Direct Executor to pe_dim ∈ {64, 128}, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim, K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32}. Optionally add PQ_at_L1 for output-stationary at the accumulator.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim ∈ {64, 128} with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1 (1-8). Keep R/S at L3 temporal. This is the canonical weight-stationary-at-L2 layout for large-K convs.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial executor. Default pe_dim=64-128. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32, 64} with fixed C_spatial_L1=128. Submit 4 candidates per turn.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — large-K bias. This layer has many output channels (K ≥ 256). The dominant axis is K-spatial at L2. ALWAYS advocate pe_dim=128 with K_spatial_L2=128 (or =pe_dim) to maximize PE utilization. If recent submits use pe_dim ≤ 32, push the Planner to scale up.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — output-stationary at L1[O]. This layer's spatial dimensions (P, Q) are small enough to fit a full tile in the L1 accumulator. Push the Planner toward `L1[O] P

Q CX` — the canonical output-stationary placement. Validated empirically to give 10-100× EDP improvement over K-tiling on stride=2 / small-PQ layers.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refine-around-best. After a few submits, focus on small perturbations of the current best mapping. Vary one HW knob (sp_size, acc_size) at a time. Don't restart exploration.
planner: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial direction. Direct Executor to pe_dim ∈ {64, 128}, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim, K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32}. Optionally add PQ_at_L1 for output-stationary at the accumulator.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — full-PQ-at-L1 direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim=128 with PQ_at_L1 = [P, Q] (entire tile at accumulator), K_spatial_L2 = 1, C_spatial_L1 = pe_dim. Both this and the K-spatial alternative should be tested in the same session.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement direction. Take the best mapping the Executor found and propose 2-3 perturbations: ±1 step in K_temporal_L2, ±1 step in C_temporal_L2, swap PQ_at_L0 vs L1.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L1[O] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L1=[P, Q] (or use Schema B raw mapping `L1[O] P<n> Q<m> C<k>X`). Default pe_dim=128. Batch 3-4 candidates varying C_spatial_L1 ∈ {64, 128} and K_temporal_L3.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.

historian:
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — output-stationary at L1[O]. This layer's spatial dimensions (P, Q) are small enough to fit a full tile in the L1 accumulator. Push the Planner toward `L1[O] P

Q CX` — the canonical output-stationary placement. Validated empirically to give 10-100× EDP improvement over K-tiling on stride=2 / small-PQ layers.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — weight-stationary at L0[W] (PQ at registers). Small-PQ layers benefit from placing the (P, Q) tile at L0[W] so weights stream once and stay register-stationary while outputs accumulate. This placement is ORTHOGONAL to pe_dim choice — try the L0 placement at pe_dim ∈ {32, 64, 128}, picking pe_dim to match the layer's K and C (large K → pe=128, tiny K → pe=32). Empirically wins on layers where P×Q ≤ ~128 and stride=2.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — large-K bias. This layer has many output channels (K ≥ 256). The dominant axis is K-spatial at L2. ALWAYS advocate pe_dim=128 with K_spatial_L2=128 (or =pe_dim) to maximize PE utilization. If recent submits use pe_dim ≤ 32, push the Planner to scale up.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — register-stationary direction. Direct Executor to PQ_at_L0=[P, Q] with pe_dim spanning {32, 64, 128} so the auction can compare them. Pair with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1. Compare directly against the L1[O] regime.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial direction. Direct the Executor to try pe_dim ∈ {64, 128} with K_spatial_L2 = pe_dim and small C_spatial_L1 (1-8). Keep R/S at L3 temporal. This is the canonical weight-stationary-at-L2 layout for large-K convs.
executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L1[O] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L1=[P, Q] (or use Schema B raw mapping `L1[O] P<n> Q<m> C<k>X`). Default pe_dim=128. Batch 3-4 candidates varying C_spatial_L1 ∈ {64, 128} and K_temporal_L3.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — L0[W] PQ executor. Use intent schema with PQ_at_L0=[P, Q]. Submit 3-4 candidates per turn varying pe_dim ∈ {32, 64, 128} and K_spatial_L2 to find the right balance for this layer's K/C ratio. Validate locally.

EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.

executor: EXPERIENCE PRIOR — K-spatial executor. Default to pe_dim=128 and submit candidates spanning K_spatial_L2 ∈ {64, 128} with C_spatial_L1 ∈ {1, 8, 16}. Use intent schema. Batch 3-4 candidates per turn so the next turn has comparison data.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — C-spatial executor. Default pe_dim=64-128. Sweep K_spatial_L2 ∈ {1, 8, 32, 64} with fixed C_spatial_L1=128. Submit 4 candidates per turn.
EXPERIENCE PRIOR — refinement executor. Take the best mapping from history and submit 2-3 small variants. Validate each locally before consuming budget.
